name: Ginger Rice
recipeInstructions:
1. Note that chicken bouillon may contain sugar, and Worcestershire sauce may also.
2. Pickled ginger can be found at any southeast Asian market; it comes sliced, but for the recipe, julienne it into very thin strips and then cut the strips into 1/8-inch pieces.
3. Combine all ingredients except Worcestershire sauce and bring to a boil, stirring once or twice.
4. Cover, reduce heat, and simmer for twenty minutes or until done.
5. Stir in Worcestershire sauce.
6. Enjoy! The pickled ginger is great over most dishes if cut thin enough. Unfortunately, markets may not always provide the same thin-cut ginger found in some oriental restaurants. However, cutting it as described prevents the ginger from becoming overpowering and allows those who should be eating something else to avoid it.
